name: Documentation Update
about: Request or propose a documentation improvement

labels: ["documentation", "needs-review"]
assignees: ""
---

# Documentation Update

## Summary

Briefly describe the documentation update.

## Documentation Area

Select all that apply:

- [ ] README
- [ ] Operating manual
- [ ] Quickstart
- [ ] Roadmap
- [ ] Project index
- [ ] Workflow map
- [ ] Workflow documentation
- [ ] Template documentation
- [ ] Schema documentation
- [ ] Example documentation
- [ ] Diagram documentation
- [ ] Other

## Affected Path

List the file or directory affected.

```text
path/to/file
```

## Reason for Update

Explain why this documentation should be changed.

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed change.

## Risk Level

Select one:

- [ ] Low — wording, formatting, or clarity
- [ ] Medium — changes workflow interpretation
- [ ] High — changes safety, approval, validation, or rollback guidance
- [ ] Critical — could weaken safety model or human approval gates

## Human Approval Impact

Does this change affect human approval requirements?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

If yes or unsure, explain.

## Validation Needed

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly
- [ ] Links are valid
- [ ] Workflow references remain accurate
- [ ] Project index remains accurate
- [ ] Diagrams remain accurate
- [ ] Repository validation passes

## Additional Context

Add any notes or references.
